metadata.description: Interactive exam prep for the Claude Certified Architect (Foundations) certification. Covers all 5 domains, 30 task statements, 6 scenarios, anti-patterns, and decision rules from the official Anthropic exam guide.

plugins.name: claude-certified-architect
plugins.description: Study for the CCA-F exam with /claude-certified-architect. Interactive domain teaching, practice questions, anti-pattern identification, and scenario walkthroughs. Based on the official Anthropic exam guide.
